sentences.en: The retention curve flattens after day 30, which indicates we found product-market fit for this cohort.
sentences.zh: 留存曲线在第30天后趋于平稳，说明我们为这个用户群找到了产品市场匹配。

sentences.en: We are running a win-back campaign targeting users who uninstalled in the past 60 days.
sentences.zh: 我们正在针对过去60天内卸载的用户运行召回活动。

sentences.en: The creative refresh increased the impression-to-install ratio by 25%.
sentences.zh: 素材更新使展示到安装的转化率提升了25%。

sentences.en: Cross-selling wealth management products to brokerage users shows promising early results.
sentences.zh: 向证券用户交叉销售理财产品的早期结果令人鼓舞。

sentences.en: We need to build an automated nurture sequence for users who abandon the KYC flow.
sentences.zh: 我们需要为放弃KYC流程的用户建立自动化培育序列。

example.en: You have product-market fit when users are disappointed if the product disappears.
example.zh: 当用户会因产品消失而失望时，你就找到了产品市场匹配。

example.en: The win-back email offered a fee waiver to lapsed subscribers.
example.zh: 召回邮件向流失订阅者提供了免手续费的优惠。

example.en: We served 2 million impressions but only 15,000 resulted in clicks.
example.zh: 我们投放了200万次展示，但只有1.5万次产生了点击。

example.en: Cross-selling increases average revenue per user without new acquisition costs.
example.zh: 交叉销售在没有新获客成本的情况下提升了用户平均收入。

example.en: A well-designed nurture sequence converts cold leads into paying customers.
example.zh: 设计良好的培育序列能将冷线索转化为付费客户。

sentences.en: The microservice architecture allows each team to deploy independently.
sentences.zh: 微服务架构允许每个团队独立部署。

sentences.en: We added a circuit breaker to prevent cascading failures across services.
sentences.zh: 我们添加了熔断器来防止跨服务的级联故障。

sentences.en: The 95th percentile response time is more meaningful than the average.
sentences.zh: 第95百分位的响应时间比平均值更有意义。

sentences.en: The beta program collected 500 pieces of qualitative feedback in two weeks.
sentences.zh: Beta测试计划在两周内收集了500条定性反馈。

sentences.en: We should implement graceful degradation so core features still work during outages.
sentences.zh: 我们应该实现优雅降级，使核心功能在故障时仍然可用。

example.en: Each microservice handles a single business domain.
example.zh: 每个微服务处理一个单独的业务领域。

example.en: The circuit breaker opens automatically when the error rate exceeds 50%.
example.zh: 当错误率超过50%时，熔断器会自动打开。

example.en: We target the 99th percentile latency to be under 200 milliseconds.
example.zh: 我们的目标是第99百分位延迟低于200毫秒。

example.en: Qualitative feedback complements quantitative data by explaining the why.
example.zh: 定性反馈通过解释原因来补充定量数据。

example.en: Graceful degradation ensures the app remains usable even when some services fail.
example.zh: 优雅降级确保即使部分服务故障，应用仍然可用。

sentences.en: The company's return on equity has consistently exceeded 20% for five straight years.
sentences.zh: 该公司的股本回报率连续五年稳定超过20%。

sentences.en: Insider buying activity has increased significantly ahead of the earnings date.
sentences.zh: 在财报日之前，内部人士买入活动显著增加。

sentences.en: The convertible bond offers downside protection with upside participation.
sentences.zh: 可转换债券提供下行保护同时保留上涨参与空间。

sentences.en: Market capitalization just crossed the $10 billion mark after today's rally.
sentences.zh: 今日反弹后，市值刚刚突破100亿美元关口。

sentences.en: The trailing twelve-month revenue shows a clear acceleration in growth momentum.
sentences.zh: 过去十二个月的营收显示增长动能明显加速。

example.en: A high return on equity indicates the company is efficient at generating profits.
example.zh: 高股本回报率表明公司在创造利润方面效率很高。

example.en: Insider buying is often interpreted as a bullish signal by the market.
example.zh: 内部人士买入通常被市场解读为看涨信号。

example.en: Convertible bonds can be converted into equity at a predetermined price.
example.zh: 可转换债券可以按预定价格转换为股权。

example.en: Market capitalization is calculated by multiplying share price by total shares outstanding.
example.zh: 市值等于股价乘以总流通股数。

example.en: Trailing twelve-month data smooths out seasonal fluctuations.
example.zh: 过去十二个月的数据能平滑季节性波动。

sentences.en: The RACI matrix clarifies who is responsible, accountable, consulted, and informed.
sentences.zh: RACI矩阵明确了谁负责执行、谁最终问责、谁需要咨询、谁需要知会。

sentences.en: We should invest in upskilling the team rather than hiring externally for every gap.
sentences.zh: 我们应该投资于团队技能提升，而不是每个缺口都外部招聘。

sentences.en: The post-incident review identified three process failures that need immediate attention.
sentences.zh: 事后复盘识别出三个需要立即关注的流程故障。

sentences.en: Transparent communication from leadership builds trust during uncertain times.
sentences.zh: 不确定时期，领导层的透明沟通能建立信任。

sentences.en: The manager calibration session ensures consistent rating standards across teams.
sentences.zh: 管理者校准会议确保各团队间评级标准一致。

example.en: Use a RACI chart to prevent confusion about project roles.
example.zh: 使用RACI图表来防止项目角色的混淆。

example.en: We budget 5% of payroll for upskilling programs each year.
example.zh: 我们每年拨出5%的薪资预算用于技能提升项目。

example.en: A blameless post-incident review focuses on systems, not individuals.
example.zh: 无指责的事后复盘关注系统问题，而非个人。

example.en: Performance calibration prevents rating inflation across departments.
example.zh: 绩效校准防止各部门的评级膨胀。

example.en: Transparent decision-making increases employee buy-in.
example.zh: 透明的决策过程能增加员工的认同感。

sentences.en: The winner-takes-all dynamic in this market makes speed critical.
sentences.zh: 这个市场的赢家通吃动态使速度至关重要。

sentences.en: We are applying the jobs-to-be-done framework to rethink our product positioning.
sentences.zh: 我们正在运用待完成工作框架来重新思考产品定位。

sentences.en: The ecosystem play requires us to open our API to third-party developers.
sentences.zh: 生态系统策略要求我们向第三方开发者开放API。

sentences.en: Concentration risk is our biggest strategic vulnerability right now.
sentences.zh: 集中风险是我们目前最大的战略脆弱点。

sentences.en: The three-horizon framework helps balance short-term execution with long-term innovation.
sentences.zh: 三地平线框架有助于平衡短期执行与长期创新。

example.en: Platform businesses often exhibit winner-takes-all market structures.
example.zh: 平台类企业通常呈现赢家通吃的市场结构。

example.en: The jobs-to-be-done framework asks what progress the customer is trying to make.
example.zh: 待完成工作框架追问客户试图取得什么进展。

example.en: A thriving ecosystem attracts more developers and creates more value for users.
example.zh: 繁荣的生态系统吸引更多开发者，为用户创造更多价值。

example.en: Relying on one market for 80% of revenue creates severe concentration risk.
example.zh: 80%的收入依赖单一市场会造成严重的集中风险。

example.en: Horizon one optimizes the core business; horizon three explores breakthrough ideas.
example.zh: 第一地平线优化核心业务；第三地平线探索突破性创意。
